Title: Patch Critical CVE in Container Base Images Across All Production Workloads
Description: Apply security patches for critical CVEs detected in base container images. Rebuild affected images, push to registry, and trigger rolling deployments across all production Kubernetes namespaces.

Title: Launch Multi-Region Active-Active Architecture for Global Platform Availability
Description: Design and implement active-active multi-region deployment enabling 99.99% SLA. Enable seamless global traffic routing, cross-region data replication, and automated regional failover.

Title: Upgrade EKS Cluster from Kubernetes 1.27 to 1.30 Across All Environments
Description: Perform in-place EKS cluster upgrade through intermediate versions 1.28 and 1.29. Validate workload compatibility, update node groups, and run full regression suite post-upgrade.

Title: Migrate Helm Chart Deployments from Helm 2 to Helm 3 Schema
Description: Convert all legacy Helm 2 charts to Helm 3 format, update release metadata, and remove Tiller dependencies. Test rollback procedures in staging before migrating production releases.

Title: Refactor Monolithic Terraform State into Modular Workspaces
Description: Break 15,000-line monolithic Terraform state into environment-scoped workspaces. Implement remote state locking, add module versioning, and migrate existing resources without downtime.

Title: Resolve Node Disk Pressure Alerts Causing Pod Evictions on Prod Cluster
Description: Investigate and remediate disk pressure conditions on production EKS worker nodes causing pod evictions. Clean up stale container images and expand node storage volumes.

Title: Renew Wildcard TLS Certificate for Internal Platform Services Domain
Description: Renew expiring wildcard TLS certificate for *.platform.internal domain. Update certificate in AWS Certificate Manager, rotate Kubernetes secrets, and validate all ingress endpoints.

Title: Build Internal Developer Platform with Self-Service Infrastructure Provisioning
Description: Create developer portal enabling self-service provisioning of cloud resources, databases, and CI/CD pipelines. Reduce time-to-environment from 2 weeks to 4 hours for all engineering teams.

Title: Respond to PagerDuty Incident for Grafana Dashboard Unavailability
Description: Investigate and restore Grafana instance unavailable due to database connection pool exhaustion. Tune connection pool settings, add circuit breaker, and document runbook for future incidents.

Title: Unblock Zero Trust Network Access Rollout Pending Security Architecture Review
Description: Platform team is blocked waiting for Security Architecture board approval for Zero Trust network topology. Work is scoped, resourced, and ready to execute pending sign-off from security governance.

Title: Consolidate Disparate CI/CD Pipelines into Unified GitLab CI Framework
Description: Audit 40+ fragmented Jenkins and GitLab pipelines across teams. Migrate to standardized GitLab CI templates, eliminate duplication, and enforce security scanning at every stage.

Title: Replace Custom Ingress Controller with AWS ALB Ingress Controller
Description: Migrate from custom NGINX ingress to AWS ALB ingress controller for improved AWS integration. Update all ingress manifests, validate SSL termination, and decommission legacy controller.

Title: Restore Failed Velero Backup Jobs for Persistent Volume Claims
Description: Debug and restore failed Velero backup jobs for critical PVCs. Validate backup integrity, update backup schedules, and configure alerting for future backup failures.

Title: Unblock Kubernetes Multi-Tenancy Rollout Awaiting FinOps Chargeback Model Approval
Description: K8s multi-tenancy implementation is ready but blocked pending FinOps team delivering namespace-level cost attribution model needed for tenant billing. Escalated to VP Engineering.

Title: Decomission Legacy On-Premises Build Agents and Migrate to Ephemeral Cloud Runners
Description: Retire aging on-premises CI build agents. Provision ephemeral cloud-based runners with autoscaling, update pipeline configurations, and decommission physical build servers.

Title: Update Expired IAM Role Trust Policies for Cross-Account Deployments
Description: Renew expired IAM trust policy conditions that are blocking cross-account deployments. Update role trust relationships, validate CI/CD pipelines resume, and schedule recurring policy reviews.

Title: Upgrade Prometheus Stack from v2.40 to v2.51 with Thanos Integration
Description: Upgrade Prometheus operator and associated components. Integrate Thanos for long-term metrics storage, migrate existing dashboards, and validate alert rule compatibility post-upgrade.

Title: Blocked: Service Mesh Expansion Requires Network Team Firewall Rule Changes
Description: Istio service mesh expansion to remaining namespaces is blocked on Network team opening required inter-namespace firewall ports. Ticket raised 3 weeks ago with no progress.

Title: Platform DR Testing Blocked Pending Vendor Contract for Secondary Region
Description: Disaster recovery test plan is complete but blocked on Procurement finalizing secondary cloud region contract. Engineering resources are standing by ready to execute.

Title: Restart Crashed Istio Control Plane Components in Service Mesh
Description: Diagnose and restart crashed Istio pilot components causing sidecar injection failures. Investigate root cause, tune resource limits, and add health check probes to prevent recurrence.

Title: Migrate Secrets from Environment Variables to HashiCorp Vault Dynamic Secrets
Description: Audit all services using hardcoded or environment-variable secrets. Migrate to Vault dynamic secret injection via sidecar pattern. Rotate all existing static credentials post-migration.
